title: HTTP Status Code Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for common HTTP status codes and their meanings.

commands.description: Switching to new protocol; obey Upgrade header
commands.scenario: Switching to new protocol; obey Upgrade header

commands.description: Processing request but no response available yet
commands.scenario: Processing request but no response available yet

commands.description: Standard response for successful HTTP requests
commands.scenario: Standard response for successful HTTP requests

commands.description: Request has been fulfilled and resulted in a new resource being created
commands.scenario: Request has been fulfilled and resulted in a new resource being created

commands.description: Request accepted for processing, but not completed
commands.scenario: Request accepted for processing, but not completed

commands.description: Resource has been moved permanently to a new URL
commands.scenario: Resource has been moved permanently to a new URL

commands.description: Resource has been moved temporarily to a new URL
commands.scenario: Resource has been moved temporarily to a new URL

commands.description: Client must use proxy to access the resource
commands.scenario: Client must use proxy to access the resource

commands.description: Request cannot be fulfilled due to bad syntax
commands.scenario: Request cannot be fulfilled due to bad syntax

commands.description: Authentication is required and has failed or not been provided
commands.scenario: Authentication is required and has failed or not been provided

commands.description: Requested resource could not be found
commands.scenario: Requested resource could not be found

commands.description: Server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request
commands.scenario: Server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request

commands.description: Server is currently unable to handle the request due to temporary overload or maintenance
commands.scenario: Server is currently unable to handle the request due to temporary overload or maintenance
